title: Report on the proposed subsidy to Mid and East Antrim Borough Council by Belfast City Council
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to Belfast City Council concerning the proposed subsidy to MEABC.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of Belfast City Council’s assessment of compliance of its proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to MEABC by Belfast City Council case page. "
